value.found_quote: Continue a local Claude Code session from your phone, tablet, or any browser using Remote Control. Works with claude.ai/code and the Claude mobile app.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes Anthropic's "Remote Control" feature for Claude Code, which allows users to continue a local Claude Code session running on their machine from a phone, tablet, or browser — monitoring and steering it remotely. The page also states "Remote Control is in research preview and available on all plans," confirming its lifecycle status as preview/research preview rather than generally available.
